title: Document CheckoutFlow service boundaries
description: Define cart validation, order creation, inventory reservation, and delivery scheduling responsibilities.

title: Extract cart validation from checkout monolith
description: Move cart validation into a dedicated component while preserving customer checkout behavior.

title: Create order creation service
description: Create a service responsible for creating orders after inventory and payment confirmation.

title: Add checkout latency dashboard
description: Track checkout latency, database pool saturation, queue depth, and order event lag.

title: Publish order placed event
description: Emit an order placed event with order ID, customer-safe status, timestamp, and correlation ID.

title: Publish inventory reserved event
description: Emit an event when items are reserved or released during checkout.

title: Build inventory reservation rules
description: Reserve low-stock items during checkout and release reservations if checkout fails or times out.

title: Design customer substitution explanation
description: Define customer-facing language for unavailable items and substitutions.

title: Create DeliveryTrack status labels
description: Define order placed, shopper picking, packed, out for delivery, delayed, delivered, and cancelled labels.

title: Map order events to delivery timeline
description: Translate internal order lifecycle events into customer-facing timeline entries.

title: Investigate duplicate delivery notifications
description: Trace notification retries and confirm customers did not have duplicate grocery orders.

title: Add idempotency key to notification events
description: Add stable idempotency keys to out-for-delivery, delayed, delivered, and cancelled notifications.

title: Deduplicate mobile push notifications
description: Prevent repeated notification events from creating repeated customer push messages.

title: Add inventory freshness timestamps
description: Expose last-updated timestamps for store inventory feeds used by search and checkout.

title: Alert on stale store inventory feeds
description: Create alerts when a store inventory feed has not updated within the freshness threshold.

title: Define support context panel requirements
description: Document safe support fields for order status, delay reason, latest message, and escalation links.

title: Review customer data access for support
description: Approve privacy rules for support access to customer address and driver-location data.

title: Create order event schema checklist
description: Define compatibility, versioning, idempotency, correlation ID, and privacy review requirements.

title: Model FreshCart memory graph
description: Define graph entities for people, projects, decisions, incidents, tickets, PRs, and discussions.

title: Create guided onboarding memory
description: Add a plain-English story layer before raw evidence so new users understand what happened.
